zh.lifeSummary: 當Christoph Gaertner於1589年6月24日出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，他的父親Christoph Gärtner22歲，母親Christina Gaetner25歲。他於1613年7月20日與Anna Feig在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1666年8月30日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christoph Gaertner于1589年6月24日出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩时，他的父亲Christoph Gärtner22岁，母亲Christina Gaetner25岁。他于1613年7月20日与Anna Feig在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1666年8月30日在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gaertner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Franz, Helmut, Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Ernst, Gerhard, Hans, Irmgard, Karl Heinz, Ulrich.

variants.name: Gartner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Gerda, Johann, Lorenz, Otto, Wolfgang, Bernd, Dieter, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Gärtner): occupational name for a gardener or vintner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German garte ‘enclosure, garden’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Slovenia (see 2 below). Compare Gaertner and Gardner .
Slovenian: of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenized variant Gartnar.

nameMeanings.name: Christoph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christoph Gaertner was born on 24 June 1589, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Christoph Gärtner, was 22 and his mother, Christina Gaetner, was 25. He married Anna Feig on 20 July 1613, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 30 August 1666, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christoph Gaertner est né le 24 juin 1589, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Christoph Gärtner, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Christina Gaetner, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anna Feig le 20 juillet 1613, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 30 août 1666, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christoph Gaertner am 24. Juni 1589 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christoph Gärtner 22 und seine Mutter Christina Gaetner 25. Er hat am 20. Juli 1613 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Anna Feig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 30. August 1666 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christoph Gaertner è nato il il 24 giugno 1589 nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Christoph Gärtner, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Christina Gaetner, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anna Feig il 20 luglio 1613, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 30 agosto 1666, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christoph Gaertnerが1589年6月24日にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで生まれた時，父Christoph Gärtnerは22歳，母Christina Gaetnerは25歳であった。1613年7月20日にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでAnna Feigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1666年8月30日に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christoph Gaertner(이)가 1589년 6월 24일 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christoph Gärtner(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Gaetner(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1613년 7월 20일 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Anna Feig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1666년 8월 30일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.24 June 1589–30 August 1666: 1589 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 24–1666 оны Наймдугаар сарын 30

pt.24 June 1589–30 August 1666: 24 de junho de 1589–30 de agosto de 1666
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christoph Gaertner nasceu em 24 de junho de 1589, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Christoph Gärtner, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Christina Gaetner, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Feig em 20 de julho de 1613, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1666, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christoph Gaertner родился 24 июня 1589 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Christoph Gärtner было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Christina Gaetner, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Feig 20 июля 1613 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 30 августа 1666 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.24 June 1589–30 August 1666: 24 de junio de 1589–30 de agosto de 1666
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christoph Gaertner nació el 24 de junio de 1589, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Christoph Gärtner, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Christina Gaetner, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anna Feig el 20 de julio de 1613, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1666, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
